name: webcam
description: Live webcam feed with optional chroma key

device.label: Camera Device
device.tooltip: Name of the camera to use (blank for default)

mask.label: Mask Shape
mask.tooltip: Clip the webcam feed to a shape

chromaKeyColor.label: Key Color
chromaKeyColor.tooltip: The background color to remove (default: green)

chromaKeySimilarity.label: Similarity
chromaKeySimilarity.tooltip: How close a color must be to the key to be removed (0.0-1.0, default 0.4)

chromaKeySmoothness.label: Smoothness
chromaKeySmoothness.tooltip: Edge softness for smoother blending (0.0-1.0, default 0.08)

chromaKeySpill.label: Spill Reduction
chromaKeySpill.tooltip: Desaturate color spill near edges (0.0-1.0, default 0.1)
